children.heading: Effect of construction orders
children.label: a Effect of construction orders
children.text: Any electric powerplant or major fuel-burning installation issued an order pursuant to that is pending on the effective date of this chapter shall, notwithstanding the provisions of such section 792(c) or any other provision of this chapter, be subject to the provisions of this chapter as if it were a new electric powerplant or new major fuel-burning installation, as the case may be, except that if such order became final before such date, the provisions of subchapter II of this chapter shall not apply to such powerplant or installation.section 792(c) of title 15

children.heading: Effect of prohibition orders
children.label: b Effect of prohibition orders
children.text: The provisions of subchapters II and III shall not apply to any powerplant or installation for which an order issued pursuant to before the effective date of this chapter is pending or final or which, on review, was held unlawful and set aside on the merits; except that any installation issued such an order under such section 792(a) which is pending on the effective date of this chapter may elect to be covered by subchapter II or III (as the case may be) rather than such section 792. Such an election shall be irrevocable and shall be made in such form and manner as the Secretary shall, within 90 days after , prescribe. Such an election shall be made not later than 60 days after the date on which the Secretary prescribes the form and manner of making such election.section 792(a) of title 15November 9, 1978

children.heading: Validity of orders
children.label: c Validity of orders
children.text: The preceding provisions of this chapter shall not affect the validity of any order issued under subsection (a), or any final order under subsection (c), of , and the authority of the Secretary to amend, repeal, rescind, modify, or enforce any such order, or rules applicable thereto, shall remain in effect notwithstanding any limitation of time otherwise applicable to such authority. Except as provided in this section, the authority of the Secretary under shall terminate on the effective date of this chapter.section 792 of title 15section 792 of title 15
